# HaremLit Guide

> Reader guides and ranked lists for harem fantasy and men's romance fiction.

HaremLit Guide is an independent editorial site that publishes curated rankings, reader guides, new release coverage, and genre analysis for harem fantasy, harem LitRPG and men's romance fiction.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://haremlitguide.com/
- Ranked Lists: https://haremlitguide.com/lists/
- New Releases: https://haremlitguide.com/new-releases/
- Blog & Guides: https://haremlitguide.com/blog/
- About: https://haremlitguide.com/about/

## Data Sources

Rankings are based on data aggregated from Harem-Lit.com, which tracks ratings, reviews, and popularity for harem fiction across Amazon Kindle, Kindle Unlimited, Audible, and Royal Road.

## Related Sites

- Harem-Lit.com — Parent platform with comprehensive harem fiction database, tracking, and discovery tools
- LitRPGCritic.com — Sister editorial site covering LitRPG and progression fantasy
- FantasyRanked.com — Sister editorial site covering broader fantasy subgenres
- LitRPGTools.com — Parent platform for LitRPG discovery and tracking

## Content Updates

New blog posts and guides published weekly via automated editorial pipeline. Rankings updated regularly based on live data from Harem-Lit.com.
